sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after moving to (9, 15)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== White dot position ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"  center=({sum(p[0] for p in b)//len(b)},{sum(p[1] for p in b)//len(b)})")

print("\n=== Gray squares with colored dots ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        b = n['boundary']
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in b) // len(b)
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in b) // len(b)
        dot_color = None
        for child_id in n['children']:
            child = next((cn for cn in seg['nodes'] if cn['id'] == child_id), None)
            if child:
                dot_color = child['color']
        print(f"  Gray square at ({center_r},{center_c}) with {dot_color} dot")

print("\n=== All small nodes ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] <= 13:
        b = n['boundary']
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in b) // len(b)
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in b) // len(b)
        print(f"  Node {n['id']:2d}: color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']:3d}, center=({center_r:2d},{center_c:2d})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
